genre_refs: WWII-era industrial mobilization propaganda poster; Statue of Liberty
description: Illustrated poster in warm painterly tones of gold, cream, blue, and rust. The central figure is the Statue of Liberty rising from billowing clouds, holding the torch aloft with golden sunrays around the flame across the sky. In the lower portion is an industrial scene: a ship under construction with a dockside crane, smokestacks and steel-mill structures emitting smoke, and aircraft. Across the right-center in bold white serif all-caps is the slogan 'YOUR NATION IS CALLING!' A small white Department of Labor seal sits in the bottom-left corner.
